messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hey there! I could use a hand with an order I placed recently. My work-from-home dreams just got crushed—my company wants us back in the office soon. I ordered a bunch of stuff for a home office setup, plus some hiking gear, but now I don’t really need the office stuff. Is there a way to cancel just those items and keep the hiking gear? Also, I’d love to know how much I’d get back if that’s possible.

message.content: Hey there! I could use a hand with an order I placed recently. My work-from-home dreams just got crushed—my company wants us back in the office soon. I ordered a bunch of stuff for a home office setup, plus some hiking gear, but now I don’t really need the office stuff. Is there a way to cancel just those items and keep the hiking gear? Also, I’d love to know how much I’d get back if that’s possible.

messages.content: oh! Let me check your order. Can i have your first name, last name and zip code

messages.content: Alright, thanks for checking! So, if I can’t cancel just the office stuff now, could you change the delivery address to my NYC place instead? That way, I can just return the office items from there once they arrive. Would that work?

message.content: Alright, thanks for checking! So, if I can’t cancel just the office stuff now, could you change the delivery address to my NYC place instead? That way, I can just return the office items from there once they arrive. Would that work?
